card_name_verified: Delta SkyMiles® Gold Business American Express Card

recurring_credits.name: Delta Stays Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $150 annual statement credit on prepaid hotels or vacation rentals booked through Delta Stays on delta.com. No spending requirement.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: Annual statement credit of up to $150 after using the Delta SkyMiles® Gold Business Card to book prepaid hotels or vacation rentals through Delta Stays on delta.com
